datadog.label: Datadog focus
datadog.plan_line: Datadog for metrics, monitors, logs, traces, and incidents.
datadog.base_notes: Query metrics, monitors, logs, traces/APM, incidents, dashboards, and SLOs via the official Datadog (Bits AI) MCP server. Strong for incident and performance root-cause: when a metric broke its baseline, which monitor alerted, and the correlated logs and traces. The managed server DOES expose write tools (mute/create/update/delete monitors, schedule/cancel downtime); read-only is enforced by giving the Datadog Application Key only the 'MCP Read' scope (see SETUP.md) — never mute monitors or schedule/cancel downtime.
